text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This sentence contains every letter of the English alphabet at least once.
Language models learn statistical patterns from large text corpora and generate coherent text by predicting the next token.
Quantization reduces model size by representing weights with fewer bits while preserving accuracy as much as possible.
Low-rank adaptation is a parameter-efficient fine-tuning method that adds trainable rank decomposition matrices to frozen weights.
